case_title: FLAGSTAR BANK VS. TARCILO CALDERA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-15-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
